curation_notes: Patch modifies a single file (esphome/components/api/proto.cpp) with 4 line changes across two functions: count_repeated_field and decode. Both functions had identical integer overflow patterns in their protobuf bounds checks (ptr + field_length > end) for LENGTH_DELIMITED and FIXED32 wire types. The fix switches to subtraction-based checks (field_length > end - ptr) to prevent wraparound. Pre-assigned class integer-overflow from CWE-190 is correct — the advisory explicitly describes an integer overflow and the patch directly addresses addition overflow in bounds checks. No sibling files found with the same vulnerability pattern.
